title: UBIQUE
collaboration: Ciné-Concert with the band Ethnophonics under the direction of Singkhéo Panya
description:
Dedicated multi-channel video player in MaxMSP-Jitter and Ableton LIVE
	                        / Editable cues for playback triggers & smooth transitions
	                        / Editable video effect chains using pixel shaders inside MaxForLive modules
	                        / Fast video sampling in MaxForLive for playback from a percussive MIDI controller
longDescription:
Dedicated multi-channel video player in MaxMSP-Jitter and Ableton LIVE
	                        / Editable cues for playback triggers & smooth transitions
	                        / Editable video effect chains using pixel shaders inside MaxForLive modules
	                        / Fast video sampling in MaxForLive for playback from a percussive MIDI controller
